channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by MRB for Open TV, 16–18 March 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by MRB for Open TV, 16–18 March 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/greek_ep_polls/2026-03-18-MRB.html
